education.school: Nanjing University of Science and Technology

education.degree: B.S. and M.S. in Software Engineering

right.about: I am currently a second-year Ph.D. student at Nanjing University of Science and Technology, supervised by Prof. Zechao Li. My research work has been published as a first author in venues such as CVPR and IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems (TNNLS). I am actively seeking an internship opportunity related to embodied intelligence and vision-language-action models.
researchInterests: Machine learning, particularly continual learning, embodied lifelong learning.
Knowledge Discovery: Granular Computing, Rough Sets, Feature Selection, etc.
Efficient training and deployment of foundation models.
news: 2026/2.22 -- Our paper "Dual-Estimator: Decoupling Global and Local Semantic Shift for Drift Compensation in Class-Incremental Learning" is accepted by CVPR 2026. Congrats.
2026/2.22 -- Our paper "Class-Aware Drift Compensation for Non-Uniform Semantic Shift in Continual Learning" is accepted by CVPR (Finding) 2026. Congrats.
2025/12.19 -- It is a great honor that the master's thesis was awarded the Excellent Master's Thesis of Jiangxi Province.
2025/09.07 -- Our paper "Granular Ball-Guided Disambiguation for Partial Multilabel Feature Selection via Maximum Consistency Minimum Uncertainty" is accepted by IEEE TNNLS. Congrats.

right.about: 我专注于可信机器学习与高效 AI 系统研究，致力于将理论方法应用于真实场景，构建可靠、可落地的智能工具。
researchInterests: 大语言模型对齐与评测。
高风险场景下的鲁棒与可解释机器学习。
基础模型的高效训练与部署。
